purpose: Integration contracts for ingesting open/free asset sources into Prismtek projects with provenance, license review, and style-fit gates before any game can consume the files.

defaultPolicy.shipPolicy: Assets must not be shipped from intake folders. Promote only reviewed, attributed, style-approved derivatives into game-local asset folders.
defaultPolicy.preferredUse: Record source, author, license, pack URL, allowed uses, required attribution, derivative edits, and target game before promotion.

adapters.name: Screaming Brain Studios Asset Intake
adapters.licenseObserved: CC0 / Public Domain stated by source site; pack-level confirmation still required

forbiddenOutputs: unreviewed raw pack files in shipped game paths

adapters.notes: Preferred source for original-looking texture and tile experiments once each pack has a receipt.

adapters.name: OpenGameArt Asset Intake
adapters.notes: Use as a discovery source only until every individual asset page is reviewed and recorded.

adapters.name: Local Uploaded Asset Pack Intake
adapters.licenseObserved: unknown until each uploaded pack is traced to its source license

forbiddenOutputs: archive files promoted directly to games

adapters.notes: Keeps user-uploaded packs useful without blindly mixing incompatible styles or unreviewed licenses into shipped games.
